metadata.description: Name of the Data Collection Rule.
Resource ID of the Data Collection Endpoint.
Resource ID of the target Log Analytics workspace.
Resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity to attach to the DCR.
Event Hub consumer group for this stream.

dataFlows.transformKql: source| extend d = parse_json(RawData) | extend EventEpochTime = tolong(d.['time']), TimeGenerated = todatetime(d.time_dt), AwsRegion = tostring(d.cloud.region), CloudProvider = tostring(d.cloud.provider), ApiOperation = tostring(d.api.operation), ApiService = tostring(d.api.service.name), Request=tostring(d.api.request),RequestId = tostring(d.api.request.uid), HttpUserAgent = tostring(d.http_request.user_agent), ActorType = tostring(d.actor.user.type), ActorArn = tostring(d.actor.user.uid), ActorAccountId = tostring(d.actor.user.account.uid), SrcIpAddress = tostring(d.src_endpoint.ip), SrcDomain = tostring(d.src_endpoint.domain), LambdaResource =  d.resources[0], Resources=d.resources, Severity = tostring(d.severity), ActivityName = tostring(d.activity_name), ActivityStatus = tostring(d.status), Unmapped = d.unmapped, Observables = d.observables,InvokedBy = tostring(d.actor.invoked_by)| extend LambdaArn = tostring(todynamic(LambdaResource)['uid']),FunctionName=tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(Request).data)).functionName) ,AccountId = tostring(todynamic(LambdaResource)['owner']['account']['uid']), ResourceType = tostring(todynamic(LambdaResource)['type'])| project TimeGenerated,EventEpochTime,CloudProvider,AwsRegion,ApiService,ApiOperation,ActivityName,ActivityStatus,Severity,RequestId,HttpUserAgent,ActorType,ActorArn,ActorAccountId,SrcIpAddress,SrcDomain,FunctionName,LambdaArn,AccountId,ResourceType,Unmapped,Observables,Resources,RawData
